input_schema.hcom_message_example: hcom send --name <sender> "@research-pipeline-claude-4 analyze: <input_id>; input=outputs/<input_id>/02_extract/v1.json; schema=schemas/03_analyze.json; then report to @research-pipeline-claude-6"

process.description: Identify themes (2-6 clusters of facts; each has name, description, supporting_facts[]).
Identify gaps (1-5 things the source does NOT cover; each has description + what_would_fill_it).
Identify contradictions (0-3 places where two facts disagree; each has claim_a, claim_b, explanation).

themes.name: surface code dominance
themes.description: Surface codes are the de facto industrial QEC

contradictions.claim_b: Industrial practice still uses 1000:1 physical-to-logical ratio
contradictions.explanation: Decoding overhead and syndrome measurement costs may offset theoretical savings

self_check.check: themes[] has 2-6 entries (per self_check step 1 of this spec)
Each theme's supporting_facts[] references at least one fact from 02_extract.facts[] (use the fact's claim text verbatim)
No invented themes (must be supported by facts); no invented gaps
Each gap's description is specific (not 'more detail would be nice')
Each claim_a/claim_b actually contradict; 'two facts about the same thing from different angles' is NOT a contradiction
Min lengths: every description, what_would_fill_it, name, claim_a, claim_b is non-empty (per schemas/03_analyze.json minLength: 1)

common_failures.failure: Theme's supporting_facts is empty (no fact reference)
common_failures.fix: Re-ground: copy the relevant claim text from 02_extract.facts[]
Make it specific; replace 'more detail would be nice' with 'No mention of X even though Y relies on it'

common_failures.failure: Contradiction is not actually a contradiction (just different angles)

failure_modes.name: Empty 02_extract
failure_modes.handling: Output {themes: [], gaps: [<whole-topic-is-empty>], contradictions: []}. Critic will fail it for being empty; orchestrator will halt.

failure_modes.name: Source is too short for themes
failure_modes.handling: 1 theme is OK; don't pad to 6.

refactor_delta.current_state: themes/gaps/contradictions identification is in this spec's Process section.
refactor_delta.target_state: All process detail stays in this spec; the analyzer's JSON contract is the only agent truth.
concrete_steps: Keep the 'Identify' sub-steps in this spec's Process section (already moved).
Add minItems: 2 and maxItems: 6 to schemas/03_analyze.json#themes (currently 0).
Add minItems: 1 and maxItems: 5 to schemas/03_analyze.json#gaps.
